LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ZAP'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEBRUARY 11, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST IMMEDIATELY DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JASON FLOM, ESQ., 510.451.0544; No other appearances.

RULING: matter discussed. at conclusion of discussion, the court grants william r. hill, esq.'s motion to be relieved as counsel of record for defendant zap. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Continued To Feb-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ZAP's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is Continued on the court's own motion to February 11, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must immediately deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
